nasb.text: Then Pharaoh commanded all his people, saying, “Every son who is born you are to cast into the Nile, and every daughter you are to keep alive.”

esv.text: Then Pharaoh commanded all his people, “Every son that is born to the Hebrews you shall cast into the Nile, but you shall let every daughter live.”

cnv.text: 法老吩咐他的眾民說：“凡是希伯來人所生的男孩，你們都要把他投在河裡；凡是女孩，就讓她活著。”

ccb.text: 后来，法老命令全埃及的人把以色列人生的所有男婴都抛进尼罗河里，只让女婴活着。
